Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer; Wallet receives offer and obtains initial access and refresh tokens using DPoP-bound request
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP binding key
- Pre-authorized code
- Token endpoint request
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves initial access token and refresh token with DPoP binding

Action: Wallet generates holder keys, creates proofs, and requests initial batch of credentials; Wallet consumes credentials through verifier flow
Data:
- Access token (DPoP-bound)
- Holder keys and proofs
- Batch credential request
- Verification flow to consume credentials
Expected Result: All initial batch credentials successfully issued and consumed

Action: Wallet requests new nonce and refreshes token using DPoP-bound refresh flow to obtain renewed token
Data:
- Refresh token
- DPoP refresh binding
- Token endpoint
- New nonce request
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with new access token and refresh token

Action: Wallet requests new batch of credentials using renewed access token via POST /credential endpoint
Data:
- Renewed access token (DPoP-bound)
- Holder keys and proofs
- Batch credential request
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 or HTTP 202; second batch of credentials successfully issued
